feat.name: Sin Counterspell
feat.text: Your deep connection to a specific sin allows you to easily negate spells that sin opposes. Instead of being able to counter a foe’s spell with Counterspell only if you have the same spell prepared, you can Counterspell it with any of your curriculum spells if the spell cast would violate your sin’s anathema.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
